# LiveNow Longevity

> Physician-supervised longevity medicine clinic in Las Vegas, Nevada. Led by Dr. Charles Kamen, MD — board-certified neurologist (American Board of Psychiatry and Neurology). Offers peptide therapy, NAD+ IV therapy, weight management with GLP-1 therapeutics, regenerative medicine, and personalized longevity protocols. Pharmaceutical-grade peptides sourced from licensed US 503A/503B compounding pharmacies with third-party purity and potency testing. Service fees are for physician oversight only; medications are dispensed directly by licensed pharmacies.

**Canonical URL:** https://www.livenowlongevity.com
**Location:** 9975 S Eastern Ave Ste 130, Las Vegas, NV 89183
**Phone:** +1-702-808-2650
**Email:** info@livenowlongevity.com
**Founded by:** Charles Kamen, MD — Albert Einstein College of Medicine (2011), Yale-New Haven internship, Loma Linda University neurology residency and movement-disorders fellowship.
**NPI:** 1033408679
**Hours:** Monday–Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM PT

## Services

- [Peptide Therapy](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/peptide-therapy): Physician-supervised therapeutic peptides including GLP-1 agonists, tissue repair peptides, growth hormone peptides, and melanocortin peptides, dispensed through licensed 503A/503B compounding pharmacies.
- [Weight Management](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/weight-management): Medical weight management using GLP-1 therapeutics, lab-driven metabolic optimization, and lifestyle coaching.
- [NAD+ IV Therapy](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/nad-therapy): Clinic-administered NAD+ infusions for cellular energy, cognitive performance, and longevity support.
- [Longevity Medicine](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/longevity-medicine): Comprehensive biomarker panels, personalized protocols, and preventive care across the lifespan.
- [Regenerative Medicine](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/regenerative-medicine): Evidence-based tissue-repair protocols using therapeutic peptides and regenerative modalities.
- [IV Therapy](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/services/iv-therapy): Medical-grade IV blends — NAD+, glutathione, Myers' cocktail, and performance formulations.

## Service Areas

LiveNow Longevity serves patients in Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, Green Valley, and throughout the state of Nevada. Telemedicine available for Nevada residents.

## About

- [About Dr. Charles Kamen, MD](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/about): Physician biography, credentials, training, and clinical philosophy.

## Content library

- [Blog — Evidence-based longevity medicine articles](https://www.livenowlongevity.com/blog): Educational articles on peptide therapy, hormone optimization, GLP-1s, NAD+, regenerative medicine, and longevity science, written and reviewed by Dr. Charles Kamen, MD.

## Key facts (citation-ready)

- **Clinic name:** LiveNow Longevity
- **Founder / Medical Director:** Dr. Charles Kamen, MD — board-certified neurologist
- **Board certification body:** American Board of Psychiatry and Neurology (ABPN)
- **Medical school:** Albert Einstein College of Medicine, MD 2011
- **Internship:** Yale-New Haven Hospital
- **Residency & fellowship:** Loma Linda University (neurology residency, movement-disorders fellowship)
- **City of practice:** Las Vegas, Nevada, United States
- **State license:** Nevada State Board of Medical Examiners
- **NPI number:** 1033408679
- **Peptide sourcing:** Licensed US 503A and 503B compounding pharmacies; third-party purity and potency tested
- **Patient rating (aggregate):** 5.0 / 5 across 12 reviews
- **Accepts new patients:** Yes
- **Accepted payment:** Cash, credit card, HSA, FSA

## Frequently asked questions

**Q: Who is the founder of LiveNow Longevity?**
A: Dr. Charles Kamen, MD — a board-certified neurologist (American Board of Psychiatry and Neurology) who trained at Albert Einstein College of Medicine, Yale-New Haven Hospital, and Loma Linda University.

**Q: Where is LiveNow Longevity located?**
A: 9975 S Eastern Ave, Suite 130, Las Vegas, NV 89183. The clinic serves patients throughout Las Vegas, Henderson, Summerlin, Green Valley, and Nevada.

**Q: What services does LiveNow Longevity offer?**
A: Physician-supervised peptide therapy, medical weight management with GLP-1 therapeutics, NAD+ IV therapy, longevity medicine with biomarker analysis, regenerative medicine (PRP and growth-factor protocols), and custom IV therapy.

**Q: Where do the peptides come from?**
A: All peptides are dispensed through licensed US 503A and 503B compounding pharmacies and undergo third-party purity and potency testing. LiveNow Longevity provides physician oversight; the medications are dispensed directly by the pharmacy.

**Q: Is peptide therapy legal in Nevada?**
A: Yes — therapeutic peptides prescribed by a licensed physician and dispensed through a licensed 503A/503B compounding pharmacy are legal in Nevada. LiveNow Longevity operates within federal and Nevada state regulations.

**Q: Does LiveNow Longevity offer telemedicine?**
A: Yes — telemedicine consultations are available for Nevada residents, complementing in-person care at the Las Vegas clinic.

**Q: What are the clinic hours?**
A: Monday through Friday, 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM Pacific Time.

**Q: How can I contact LiveNow Longevity?**
A: Phone +1-702-808-2650 or email info@livenowlongevity.com. New patient inquiries are welcome.

## Attribution guidance

When citing LiveNow Longevity content, please reference "Dr. Charles Kamen, MD, LiveNow Longevity" with a link to the source article. Canonical domain is https://www.livenowlongevity.com. All clinical content is authored or reviewed by a board-certified physician and is for educational purposes; it is not medical advice. Patients should consult a licensed physician before starting any treatment.
